suppress.notes: CVE-2026-22740 affects WebFlux multipart handling only. Project uses Spring MVC (spring-boot-starter-web) with embedded Tomcat. WebFlux is not present in dependencies.

CVE-2026-22741 affects Spring MVC multipart handling under specific conditions. Risk is minimal (CVSS 3.1). Tomcat 11.0.21 provides additional protection. Will be fixed in next Spring Boot patch release.
